This '''freighter captain''' was one of many former members of the [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] home defense force who became [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and scouts hoping to help liberate Ralltiir from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CCG" />

A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], the captain was present in the streets of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] when [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] passed by on their way to [[Docking Bay 94/Legends|Docking Bay 94]] and the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'' shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Moments later, he quickly moved clear of the contingent of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] that were heading to intercept Kenobi and the others.<ref name="ANH" />
